heading: Definitions
label: 49103 Definitions

L. 99–591, title VI, § 6004100 Stat. 3341–377In this section, the text of section 6004(1) and (5) of the Metropolitan Washington Airports Act of 1986 (, , 1783–375, , ) is omitted as surplus because the complete names of the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration and the Secretary of Transportation are used the first time those terms appear in a section.Public Law 99–500100 Stat. 1783–374Public Law 99–591100 Stat. 3341–378In clause (1), the words “an organization within the Federal Aviation Administration” are omitted as surplus.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 49103 was renumbered .section 50103 of this title
Amendments1998—Pars. (3), (5). substituted “Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport” for “Washington National Airport”.Pub. L. 105–154

Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–154, § 1112 Stat. 3Feb. 6, 1998“The airport described in the Act entitled ‘An Act to provide for the administration of the Washington National Airport, and for other purposes’, approved () [section 2401 et seq. of former Title 49, Transportation, see References in Text note above], and known as the Washington National Airport, shall be known and designated as the ‘Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport’.”June 29, 194054 Stat. 686, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–154, § 2(b)112 Stat. 4Feb. 6, 1998“Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Washington National Airport shall be deemed to be a reference to the ‘Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport’.”

children.text: “Airports Authority” means the Metropolitan Washington Airports Authority, a public authority created by Virginia and the District of Columbia consistent with the requirements of .section 49106 of this title
“employee” means any permanent Federal Aviation Administration personnel employed by the Metropolitan Washington Airports on .June 7, 1987
“Metropolitan Washington Airports” means Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport and Washington Dulles International Airport.

“Washington Dulles International Airport” means the airport constructed under the Act of (ch. 905, ), and includes the Dulles Airport Access Highway and Right-of-way, including the extension between Interstate Routes I–495 and I–66.September 7, 195064 Stat. 770
“Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport” means the airport described in the Act of (ch. 444, ).June 29, 194054 Stat. 686
